images.alt: Our cat Charles, meditating in the garden, in between the breaks he takes to talk at us in a frantic, possibly coked-up sort of way about his goals for his new £2000 per month online life coaching courses and the manifesting he's been doing as part of his general mission to fully unlock his spiritual potential in 2026.

record.text: He’s been getting quite heavily into mindfulness lately. It’s not that I have a problem with it. I just wish he would stop banging on about it all the time
